sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports tenderness over the distal phalanx of the right middle finger. The patient reports pain in the right middle finger. The patient reports very much so pain.
medical_concepts: tenderness over the distal phalanx of the right middle finger
pain in the right middle finger

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is 110/70 mmHg. Heart rate is 78 bpm. The right middle finger exhibits swelling and bruising. X-ray of the right middle finger reveals a distal phalanx fracture.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has a distal phalanx fracture of the middle finger. The patient has a fracture.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The patient will receive a finger splint. The patient will receive tramadol 50 mg every 6 hours as needed for pain for two days. The patient will receive tramadol. The patient will have a follow-up x-ray in two weeks.

medical_concepts: tenderness over the distal phalanx of the right middle finger
pain in the right middle finger
